name: MCP Tool Builder
description: Build new @mcp.tool() functions that extend AI-Hydro — born compliant with tiers, hot/summary injection, argument-repair, self-correcting errors, and session resolution
author: AI-Hydro Team
when_to_use: When the user wants to add a new MCP tool, wrap a hydrology library, expose a new data source, or extend AI-Hydro's capabilities
